MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Laura Flynn Strazzo (415-318-5709) for Plaintiff/ Moving party Michael Rollins.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ROLLINS, HEIDY ROLLINS Otice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court notes that Notice of Motion do not fully comply with CRC 3.1110 and 3.1324. In the future non-compliant motions will be denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charles F.
